items.title: Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end war
items.summary: Energy prices fall and stock markets rebound after the US president says "very good and productive" talks have been held.

items.title: UN warns Earth's climate being 'pushed beyond its limits' as El Niño looms
items.summary: The Earth's climate is further out of balance than at any time in recorded history, the UN's weather agency says.

items.title: HK police can now demand phone passwords under new national security rules
items.summary: Those who do not comply can be jailed for up to a year and fined up to HK$100,000 ($12,700; £9,600).

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 哥倫比亞運輸機墜毀　傳約80軍人據信罹難
items.summary: 哥倫比亞軍方今天表示，一架運輸機在哥倫比亞南部墜毀，約80名軍人據信罹難。  一名軍方消息人士告訴法新社，這架力士C-130式（Hercules C-130）運輸機在位於哥國南部邊境地區的萊...…

items.title: 川普稱若達協議將接收伊朗濃縮鈾　共管荷莫茲海峽
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天表示，若美國與伊朗達成協議，美國將接收伊朗濃縮鈾，並稱荷莫茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）將由雙方共同控制。  美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）報導，川普在美國佛羅里達...…

items.title: 台人遊南韓最愛買棉被！老闆曝占9成業績：沒台灣客就倒了
items.summary: 台灣有不少人喜歡到南韓旅遊購物，但沒有想到近年台灣客最愛入手的商品竟然是「棉被」！首爾歷史最悠久、規模最大的知名傳統市場「廣藏市場」的一位寢具店老闆甚至直言，店內幾乎有9成客人都...…
